ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Good response, but could be more natural and less formal to fit the merchant persona better in this context of urgency.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>1<TAB>3<TAB>2<TAB>Short note: Lacks relevance to current events; does not align with a practical and persuasive merchant's persona or the situation at hand, which demands urgency.
